SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template.impl

Interface BindHint

All Known Implementing Classes:
BindHint.NoBindHint
public sealed interface BindHint permits BindHint.NoBindHint (not exhaustive)
Marker interface that represents a binding hint used during SQL template binding.

A BindHint allows information discovered during template compilation to be carried over to the binding phase. This avoids having to re-derive the same structural or contextual information while binding parameters.

Hints are emitted during compilation and attached to template elements. During binding, they can influence placeholder handling, value ordering, or clause-specific behavior without requiring additional inspection of the model or SQL structure.

The concrete hint types are scoped to specific SQL clauses, such as SET, VALUES, or WHERE, and are only meaningful within their respective processing phases.

The BindHint.NoBindHint variant represents the absence of any binding hint and can be used as a neutral default.

Since:
1.8

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type

    static final record 
    BindHint.NoBindHint
    Represents the absence of a binding hint.
